scripts.clean:reports: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('reports', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('reports', { recursive: true })"
scripts.clean:artifacts: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['success-message-debug.png','usage-dropdown-debug.png']) fs.rmSync(file, { force: true }); fs.rmSync('allure-results', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('reports', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('reports', { recursive: true });"
scripts.test:mobile: node tests/utils/run-cucumber-with-summary.js --profile loginOnly --name "User logs in with Mobile Number"
scripts.test:contractf:both: node node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber-js --profile explicitPaths tests/features/05_ContractF/11_create_contract_f_unit.feature tests/features/05_ContractF/12_approve_contract_f_unit.feature tests/features/05_ContractF/01_create_contract_f.feature tests/features/05_ContractF/03_approve_contract_f.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --require tests/support/world.ts --require tests/support/hooks.ts --format progress
scripts.test:contracta:create-approve: node node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber-js --profile explicitPaths tests/features/02_ContractA/01_create_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/02_approve_contract.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --require tests/support/world.ts --require tests/support/hooks.ts --format progress
scripts.test:contracta:all: npm run test:contracta:unit:lifecycle && npm run test:contracta:land
scripts.test: node tests/utils/run-cucumber-with-summary.js --tags "not @rejectContract and not @rejectEditContract and not @rejectExtendContract and not @rejectCancelContract"
scripts.test:flow:lifecycle: npm run clean:allure && node tests/utils/run-cucumber-with-summary.js tests/features/01_Login/02_username.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/01_create_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/02_approve_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/03_edit_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/04_approve_edited_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/05_extend_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/06_approve_extension.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/07_cancel_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/08_approve_cancellation.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --require tests/support/world.ts --require tests/support/hooks.ts --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber_report.html --format allure-cucumberjs/reporter
scripts.test:reject:11:deferred: node tests/utils/run-cucumber-with-summary.js tests/features/01_Login/02_username.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/11_reject_contract.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --require tests/support/world.ts --require tests/support/hooks.ts --format progress
scripts.test:reject:deferred: node tests/utils/run-cucumber-with-summary.js tests/features/01_Login/02_username.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/11_reject_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/12_reject_edit_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/13_reject_extend_contract.feature tests/features/02_ContractA/14_reject_cancel_contract.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/steps/**/*.ts --require tests/support/world.ts --require tests/support/hooks.ts --format progress
scripts.allure:generate: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report 2>nul || echo 'Allure report generated from cucumber JSON'
scripts.allure:open: allure open allure-report 2>nul || echo 'Open report in browser'
